info.name: Shopify Inventory Transfer And Shipment 2026-01
info.description:
Runnable Postman collection for Shopify Admin GraphQL inventory transfer and shipment flows on API version 2026-01.

Sequence:
1. Fill the environment values for locations and inventory items.
2. Run a request from 01 Draft Transfer Flow or 03 Ready-To-Ship Direct Flow.
3. Run the matching detail query to capture generated line item and shipment IDs.
4. Continue with shipment mutations and receive mutations as required.

Notes:
- The collection is pinned to 2026-01 because that is the requested version.
- inventoryShipmentSetBarcode is intentionally excluded because it was added in 2026-04 and would not be runnable on 2026-01.
- Idempotent mutations use Postman {{$guid}} values in the body so repeated runs do not reuse the same key.
- Transfer and shipment detail queries store IDs back into the active Postman environment for the next request.

Scale support:
- Use 00 Scale Setup > Location Inventory Levels to page live inventory by location.
- Use 00 Scale Setup > Run Inventory Items Bulk Export and Current Bulk Operation when you need a full inventory export for large-route planning.

item.name: 00 Scale Setup
item.description: Requests used to discover large route candidates before creating bulk inventory transfers.

exec: if (pageInfo?.hasNextPage && pageInfo?.endCursor) { pm.environment.set('after_cursor', JSON.stringify(pageInfo.endCursor)); } else { pm.environment.set('after_cursor', 'null'); }

request.description: Pages live inventory levels for one location. Use this to identify tracked items with enough available quantity before building a large transfer route.
Starts a Shopify bulk export of inventory items with location inventory levels. Use this when you need a full large-scale inventory discovery pass.
Polls the currently running Shopify bulk operation and captures the download URL when it completes.

item.name: 00 Queries
item.description: Read requests to inspect transfers and shipments and to hydrate environment variables for later mutation requests.

request.description: Lists inventory transfers. Useful as a starting point to capture an existing transfer ID.
Gets a single transfer with line items and linked shipments. Run this after transfer creation, line-item changes, or shipment creation.
Gets a single shipment with line items, tracking, and receive totals. Run this after shipment create, add-items, tracking, in-transit, or receive requests.

item.name: 01 Draft Transfer Flow
item.description: Create a draft transfer, then edit, set items, remove items, and mark it ready to ship.

request.description: Official mutation: inventoryTransferCreate. Creates a draft transfer with line items.
Official mutation: inventoryTransferEdit. Uses the edit-specific originId and destinationId fields.
Official mutation: inventoryTransferSetItems. Adds or resets quantities by inventory item.
Official mutation: inventoryTransferRemoveItems. Requires transfer line item IDs, not inventory item IDs.
Official mutation: inventoryTransferMarkAsReadyToShip.

item.name: 02 Shipment Flow
item.description: Shipment operations after a transfer is ready to ship.

request.description: Official mutation: inventoryShipmentCreate. Creates a draft shipment against the transfer.
Official mutation: inventoryShipmentAddItems.
Official mutation: inventoryShipmentUpdateItemQuantities. Note that the payload field is shipment, not inventoryShipment.
Official mutation: inventoryShipmentRemoveItems. Requires shipment line item IDs.
Official mutation: inventoryShipmentSetTracking.
Official mutation: inventoryShipmentMarkInTransit.

Official mutation: inventoryShipmentReceive. This request is aligned to the 2026-01 documented example shape for maximum runnability. If you want to test optional dateReceived or bulkReceiveAction arguments, extend this request after the basic flow succeeds.

item.name: 03 Ready-To-Ship Direct Flow
item.description: Alternate path when you want Shopify to start from a ready-to-ship transfer or to create the shipment directly in transit.

request.description: Official mutation: inventoryTransferCreateAsReadyToShip.
Official mutation: inventoryShipmentCreateInTransit.

item.name: 04 Cleanup And Variations
item.description: Non-happy-path and variation requests for duplicate and cancel behavior.

request.description: Official mutation: inventoryTransferDuplicate.
Official mutation: inventoryTransferCancel.
